title: Toulou Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Toulou with a Z-Score of +5.77. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Toulou is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.2 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 30%, which is relatively low, but the wind speed of 11.4 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief. 
 The city is experiencing a critical situation, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and a high CDD value, indicating a significant heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
